Campus Sports Fest 2024 Applications Have Started!

Dear students and members of Kadir Has University,

Applications have started for the tournaments we will hold within the university in the 2023-2024 period. You can register for the sports you are interested in using the QR codes below.

We expect the participation of all our students, academic and administrative staff.

Quick Search

Through this form, you can access news, announcements, faculties and departments, base scores, our academic staff and administrative personnel, and their internal phone numbers.
